# Copilot Instructions Entry Point

Use the consolidated instruction set under:

- `.github/agent-reference/copilot-core.instructions.md` (agent-facing English instructions)
- `.github/agent-reference/copilot-guidance-ja-reference.md` (human-facing Japanese reference)
- `.github/agent-reference/new-grad-data-scientist-mentoring.instructions.md` (mentoring guidance for early-career data scientists)

When editing or adding instruction-related files, place them in `.github/agent-reference/`.
